title: HatAnalysis
description: The output a hat subagent returns when analyzing a single concept in Phase 2.

hat.description: The hat color. Blue is the orchestrator and does not produce this output type.

concept_id.description: ID of the concept being analyzed (from concepts.json).

summary.description: One-paragraph distillation of this hat's verdict on the concept.

points.description: Specific points from this hat's perspective. Each point must be concrete, not generic.

weight.description: How significant this point is from this hat's perspective.

open_questions.description: Questions this hat raises that other hats or the user should answer.

sources.description: Required for White hat (facts must be sourced). Optional for others.
